title: SEO Tools Pricing Guide for 2026
description: A transparent comparison of SEO tool pricing across Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Moz to help you budget for the right SEO platform.
body:
SEO tools are a significant investment for marketing teams, with pricing that scales with project count, user seats, and feature depth. Understanding what each tier includes and where costs escalate is essential for choosing the right platform. Pricing for SaaS tools changes periodically, so checking each vendor's current pricing page for the latest figures is recommended before making a purchasing decision.

## Ahrefs Pricing

Ahrefs offers five pricing tiers designed for different team sizes. The Starter plan at $29 per month supports one project and is appropriate for freelancers and small site owners. The Lite plan at $129 per month supports five projects with core features including site explorer, keyword explorer, and rank tracking. The Standard plan at $249 per month for 20 projects is the most popular tier, adding content explorer and Batch Analysis. The Advanced plan at $449 per month for 50 projects adds access to Ahrefs' API. The Enterprise plan at $1,499 per month for 100 projects provides priority support and custom reporting.

## SEMrush Pricing

SEMrush offers three SEO Classic plan tiers. The Pro plan at $139.95 per month supports five projects and includes keyword research, competitor analysis, and site audit tools. The Guru plan at $249.95 per month for 15 projects adds content marketing tools and historical data. The Business plan at $499.95 per month for 40 projects includes API access, white-label reports, and extended limits. Note that SEMrush also offers SEMrush One, a separate product line combining SEO with AI-powered visibility tools starting around $199 per month, which is a different product from the SEO Classic plans.

## Moz Pricing

Moz offers SEO tools with pricing tiers for different team sizes and needs. Its plans include keyword research, link analysis, and site audit capabilities. Current pricing for each tier is available on Moz's pricing page. Moz is a strong option for teams that value educational resources and a more approachable interface.

## Choosing Based on Budget

Freelancers and small teams on limited budgets may find Ahrefs' Starter plan at $29 per month or a Moz subscription appropriate for basic keyword research and rank tracking. Growing in-house teams should evaluate Ahrefs' Standard plan at $249 per month or SEMrush's Guru plan at $249.95 per month for comprehensive SEO analysis. Agencies managing multiple client accounts will need higher-tier plans with sufficient project capacity, such as Ahrefs Advanced at $449 per month or SEMrush Business at $499.95 per month. Enterprise organizations with demanding SEO programs should budget for Ahrefs Enterprise at $1,499 per month or evaluate SEMrush's custom enterprise options.
author: PilotStack Team
